page.title: Share Google Drive Content
page.subtitle: Embed Google Drive files and folders on your site.
onboarding.welcomeDesc: Embed Google Drive files directly on your Wix site — Docs, Sheets, Slides, Forms, PDFs, and more. Visitors can view or even collaborate in real time.
onboarding.step.addWidgetDesc: Place the Google Drive Viewer on your page
onboarding.step.pasteLinkDesc: Add a Google Drive sharing link in Settings
onboarding.step.customizeDesc: Adjust height, borders, and view mode
onboarding.step.publishDesc: Your content is live on your site
onboarding.readyToStartDesc: Test a Google Drive link in the dashboard to see how it will look on your site.
stats.supportedTypesTooltip: All Google Drive content types you can embed
stats.supportedTypesList: Docs, Sheets, Slides, Forms, Drawings, Maps, PDFs, Office, Media, Folders
stats.quickTestTooltip: Test a Google Drive link before adding it to your site
stats.upgradeTooltip: Unlock premium features for your embeds
tester.title: Test a Google Drive Link
tester.subtitle: Paste a link below to verify it works before adding it to your widget.
tester.label: Google Drive Link
tester.info: Paste a sharing link from Google Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Forms, or My Maps. The file must be shared so visitors can view it (e.g. Anyone with the link).
tester.urlError: Use a sharing link from Google Drive, Docs, Sheets, Forms, or My Maps.
tester.readyToUse: {type} link — ready to use in the widget Settings panel.
tester.emptyTitle: Paste a Google Drive link above
tester.emptyDesc: Your content preview will appear here after you paste a valid sharing link.
tester.previewOnlyDesc: This preview is for testing purposes. To display this content on your live site, add the widget in the Editor and publish.
howTo.title: How to Use
howTo.subtitle: Add Google Drive content to your site in 3 steps.
howTo.step1Desc: In the Wix Editor, find the "Google Drive Viewer" widget in the Add Elements panel and place it on your page.
howTo.step2Desc: Click the widget, open Settings, and paste a sharing link. Make sure the file is shared as "Anyone with the link."
howTo.step3Desc: Adjust height, borders, view mode, and add an optional title from the Settings panel.
howTo.editModeDesc: The Google Drive file must be shared as "Anyone with the link" with "Editor" access. In Google Drive, right-click the file → Share → change "Viewer" to "Editor" before pasting the link.
types.heading: Supported Content Types
types.docsDesc: Embed documents for reading or collaborative editing.
types.sheetsDesc: Display spreadsheets with live data directly on your site.
types.slidesDesc: Showcase presentations with full slide navigation.
types.formsDesc: Embed forms to collect responses from site visitors.
types.drawingsDesc: Embed diagrams and flowcharts from Google Drawings.
types.mapsDesc: Display custom maps with markers, routes, and layers.
types.mediaDesc: Preview PDFs, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, images, video, and audio.
types.foldersDesc: Let visitors browse files in a shared folder.
tips.title: Tips for Best Results
tips.share: Make sure files are shared with "Anyone with the link" for visitors to see them.
tips.editAccess: For edit mode, the file must have "Editor" access enabled in sharing settings.
tips.forms: Google Forms display the live form — visitors can submit responses directly on your site.
tips.loading: Large files or folders may take a moment to load.
pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs.
plan.premiumDesc: You have full access to all features including watermark removal and collaborative editing.
plan.freeDesc: Upgrade to remove watermarks and unlock collaborative editing mode.
upsell.title: Unlock Premium Features
upsell.desc: Remove watermarks and enable collaborative editing mode for your Google Drive embeds.
help.title: Need Help?
help.description: Having trouble? Our support team is here to help.
help.linkNotLoadingDesc: In Google Drive, open Share and set access to "Anyone with the link."
help.editNotWorkingDesc: Set the file sharing to "Editor" and use a Premium plan.
moreApps.title: More apps by us
moreApps.frequentlyBoughtTogetherDesc: Show Frequently Bought Together in the Side Cart
moreApps.shippingAddressVerifierDesc: Protect your store from invalid orders
moreApps.productViewer360Desc: Interactive 360° product views that boost sales
moreApps.customAdditionalFeesDesc: Add custom fees to your store checkout
panel.title: Google Drive Content
panel.tipTitle: Test your link in the Dashboard first
panel.tipDesc: Paste your Google Drive link in the app Dashboard to preview it before adding to the page. Use Manage to open the Dashboard.
panel.upgradeDesc: Remove watermarks and unlock collaborative editing mode.
panel.driveLinkInfo: Paste a sharing link from Google Drive, Docs, or My Maps. The file must be shared so visitors can view it (e.g. Anyone with the link).
panel.urlError: Use a sharing link from Google Drive, Docs, Sheets, Forms, or My Maps.
panel.titleInfo: Shown above the embed. Leave empty for no title.
panel.titlePlaceholder: Add a title above the content
panel.viewModeInfo: Preview shows read-only content. Edit (collaborative) is a Premium feature that allows visitors to edit the document directly on your site.
panel.folderViewInfo: Choose how files are displayed when embedding a Google Drive folder. List shows a detailed file list, Grid shows large icons.
panel.showBorderDesc: Add a border around the embed
panel.howToShare: HOW TO GET A SHARE LINK
panel.howToStep1: 1. Open the file or folder in Google Drive
panel.howToStep2: 2. Click "Share" and set access to "Anyone with the link"
panel.howToStep3: 3. For Edit mode, change the role from "Viewer" to "Editor"
panel.howToStep4: 4. Copy the link and paste it above
panel.supported: Supported: Docs, Sheets, Slides, Forms, Drawings, My Maps, PDFs, Office, images, video, audio, and folders.
widget.placeholderSubtitle: Click the Settings button to add a Google Drive link. Supports Docs, Sheets, Slides, Forms, Office files, and PDFs.
widget.invalidUrl: Invalid Google Drive URL. Please provide a valid sharing link.
ratePopup.title: How are you liking our app?
